items.headline: Marvell Technology stock surges as investors pile into AI-related semiconductor names on bullish analyst calls and strategic AI validation
Bank of America raises Marvell Technology price target from $125 to $200, reiterates Buy rating on stronger AI growth outlook
AMD discloses new $6.5 million stake in Marvell Technology in latest 13F filing, seen as peer endorsement
Broader optimism for AI semiconductors boosts Marvell as analysts project faster AI-driven sales growth and stronger returns for U.S. chip sector
Marvell’s AI connectivity and custom-silicon strategy gains attention following Polariton acquisition and interest in optical interconnect and networking
Marvell Technology shares rebound after recent underperformance versus broader market amid renewed AI and networking optimism
